title: <div>  •  Consciousness is fundamental (idealism, panpsychism, integrated inform
content:
• Consciousness is fundamental (idealism, panpsychism, integrated information theory).
• The Medium is the Message (McLuhan: structure shapes meaning more than content).
• What Can Be Computed, Will Be (Church–Turing thesis; AI metaphysics).
• Systems Self-Replicate or Collapse (autopoiesis vs. entropy).
IV. HOW TO USE THIS
Where it goes:   This framework can seed mythic OS design, worldbuilding laws, cosmology modules, recursive logic in AI, and metaphysical storytelling. Can act as base layer in ::RE:GE_OS, ::M4, or ::4_bl00m.
Why it matters:   Each law is a truth of both symbol and substance. Treat them as programmable conditions, metaphors, or creative scaffolding—across disciplines, timelines, or narrative layers. They can be modulated, remixed, or inverted to define alternate universes or simulate theological/philosophical conditions.
Suggested Workflow Types: • experimental → for symbolic world creation
• theoretical → for philosophical or academic layering
• generative → for algorithmic art or AI storytelling seeds
• archival → for myth-mapping, truth-codex indexing
